title: Tarachia ruta-muraria
taxonomy: Tarachia ruta-muraria is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. It is native to the Americas and is known to produce a type of fruit. The classification of Tarachia ruta-muraria has not been extensively documented in recent botanical literature. However, it is generally grouped as part of the Cucurbitaceae family, which includes other plants like cucumbers and melons. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification of Tarachia ruta-muraria.
uses: Tarachia ruta-muraria has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
